summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Aurora Therapiezentrum experts page. All core functionality working correctly including hero section, navigation, expert cards with expansion animation, contact buttons, responsive design, and contact section.

design_issues.issue: Some cards might appear expanded initially instead of collapsed - minor animation timing issue

passed_tests: Hero section displays correct title 'Unsere Expertinnen und Experten'
Header navigation with all required links (Startseite, Unsere Experten, Das Angebot, Kontakt)
All 3 category headers are visible (Psychotherapie, Coaching, Physiotherapie und Osteopathie)
All 4 expert cards display correctly with images, names and roles
Expert card expansion on click shows room image and description
Contact buttons (Email, Phone, Website) work correctly with proper links
Mobile responsive design works with hamburger menu
Mobile expert card interactions function properly
Contact section at bottom with working contact button
Scroll animations and page transitions work
All expert data displays correctly (Daniel Karg, Ulrich Passow, Carina Roy, Michaela Stabenow)
